folio.label: 204r
folio.l: Demetú al thyng be spoke of hi~ I wys
That was the cause , he gan so ney he drawe
To his ©eman , to herken al his sawe
And thus he seide , vn to his ©eman thoo
Holde æè thy pees , & speke no wordes moo
For if æè do , thow shalt it dere a bye
Thow sclaundrest me heere , in this companye
And eke discouerest , æ æè shuldest hide
ña quod oure hoost , telle on what so betide
Of al his thretenynge , rekke nat a myte
In feitú quod he , nomore I do but lyte
And whan this Chanou~ saw , it wolde nat be
But his ©eman , wolde telle his pryuete
He fledde a wey , for verrey sorwe & shame
A quod the ©eman , heere shal rise a game
Al that I can , a noon I wol ©ow telle
Syn he is gon , the foule fend hi~ quelle
For neuere heere after , wyl I w hi~ mete
For peny ne for pound , I ©ow byhete
He æ me brougút first , vn to that game
Er that he dye , sorwe haue he & shame
For it is ernest to me , be my feitú
And ©et for al my smert , & al my grief
For al my sorwe , labour & meschief
I coude neuere leue it , in no wyse
Now wolde god my wyt , mygút suffise
To tellen al , æ longetú to that art
And nathelees , ©ow wil I tellen part
Syn æ my lord is gon , I wyl nat spare
Swicú thyng as that I knowe , I wil declare
Heere endetú the prologe of the Chanou~s ©eman ,
